mapper.insert: insert into orders (number, status, user_id, address_book_id, order_time, cancel_reason, user_name, pay_status, pack_amount, consignee, delivery_status, estimated_delivery_time, cancel_time, remark, pay_method, rejection_reason, checkout_time, address, delivery_time, phone, tableware_status, tableware_number, amount) values (#{number}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{addressBookId}, #{orderTime}, #{cancelReason}, #{userName}, #{payStatus}, #{packAmount}, #{consignee}, #{deliveryStatus}, #{estimatedDeliveryTime}, #{cancelTime}, #{remark}, #{payMethod}, #{rejectionReason}, #{checkoutTime}, #{address}, #{deliveryTime}, #{phone}, #{tablewareStatus}, #{tablewareNumber}, #{amount})
mapper.update:
update orders
cancel_reason=#{cancelReason},
rejection_reason=#{rejectionReason},
cancel_time=#{cancelTime},
pay_status=#{payStatus},
pay_method=#{payMethod},
checkout_time=#{checkoutTime},
status = #{status},
delivery_time = #{deliveryTime}
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from orders where status = #{status}
select sum(amount) from orders where order_time >= #{begin} and order_time < #{end} and status = #{status}
select DATE(order_time) as date, SUM(amount) as value from orders where order_time >= #{begin} and order_time < #{end} and status = #{status} group by DATE(order_time) order by date
select count(*) from orders where order_time >= #{begin} and order_time < #{end}
select DATE(order_time) as date, COUNT(*) as value from orders where order_time >= #{begin} and order_time < #{end} group by DATE(order_time) order by date
